title: NITI Aayog Vision 2047
text: Policy Document: NITI Aayog Vision India@2047. Roadmap for Viksit Bharat (Developed India) by 2047 (centenary of independence). Targets: $30 trillion economy, 100% literacy, zero poverty, clean energy transition, top-3 global manufacturing. State-level strategy papers for each state.

title: National Education Policy 2020
text: Policy Document: National Education Policy 2020. Replaces 34-year-old 1986 policy. 5+3+3+4 school structure. 50% GER target by 2035. Mother tongue/regional language instruction till Class 5. Academic Bank of Credits. National Research Foundation. Multiple entry-exit in higher education.

title: National Logistics Policy 2022
text: Policy Document: National Logistics Policy 2022. Target: Reduce logistics cost from 14% to 8% of GDP. PM GatiShakti integration. Unified Logistics Interface Platform (ULIP). Ease of Logistics Services (ELOS). Multimodal connectivity. Digital documentation for freight.

title: India's Long-term Low Emission Development Strategy
text: Policy Document: India's LT-LEDS presented at COP27 (2022). Net Zero by 2070 target. 500 GW non-fossil fuel by 2030. 50% cumulative electric power from renewables by 2030. Green hydrogen mission. Carbon intensity reduction of 45% by 2030 vs 2005 levels.

title: PM GatiShakti National Master Plan
text: Policy Document: PM GatiShakti National Master Plan (2021). GIS-based integrated planning for 7 engines of growth: railways, roads, ports, waterways, airports, mass transit, logistics. 16 ministries connected. Reduces project delays, cost overruns, and multi-modal inefficiencies.

title: National Health Policy 2017
text: Policy Document: National Health Policy 2017. Target: Health expenditure to 2.5% of GDP. Ayushman Bharat framework. Primary healthcare strengthening. Disease surveillance. Medical education reform. Focus: Universal Health Coverage, preventive care, reducing out-of-pocket expenditure.
